title: Someswarar Temple, Pazhayarai
tagline: Someswarar Temple, Pazhayarai — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Pazhaiyarai vadathali Temple, or Pazhaiyarai Vadathali is a Hindu temple dedicated to Someswarar, a form of Shiva.
overview.description: Pazhaiyarai vadathali Temple, or Pazhaiyarai Vadathali is a Hindu temple dedicated to Someswarar, a form of Shiva. It is located 6 km from Kumbakonam, Tamilnadu, India, on the Kumbakonam- Aavoor Road, 2 km away from the Thenupuriswarar Temple at Patteeswaram and 3 km from Darasuram. It is served by buses from Kumbakonam or mini buses from Darasuram, the bus stop is Cholan Maligai. The Darasuram railway station is located close to the temple.

topPlaces.name: Orathanadu Taluk
topPlaces.description: Orathanadu taluk, which is pronounced as 'Oraththanaadu' taluk, is a taluk of Thanjavur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk are located at Orathanadu.

topPlaces.name: Thennamanadu
topPlaces.description: Thennamanadu is a village panchayat in Orattanadu Block of Thanjavur district in Tamil Nadu, South India. It is located between the cities of Thanjavur and Pattukkottai, 20 km (12 mi) from Thanjavur, 2 km (1.2 mi) from Orathanadu and 339 km (211 mi) from the state capital Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Ayangudi, Thanjavur
topPlaces.description: Ayangudi is a village in the Orathanadu taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Tirumangalakottai East
topPlaces.description: Tirumangalakottai East is a village in the Orathanadu taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Orathanad
topPlaces.description: Orathanad (or Mukthambalpuram; sometimes Orathanadu) is a town in Thanjavur district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is recognised as a Town Panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Ammankudi
topPlaces.description: Ammankudi is a village in the Orathanadu taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. Ammankudi, also known as Rajarajeswaram and Devi Tapovanam is situated near Kumbakonam in Thanjavur District.

topPlaces.name: Paridiniyamam Parithiappar Temple
topPlaces.description: Keezhvengainaadu Paridiniyamam Parithiappar Temple (கீழ்வேங்கைநாடு பரிதிநியமம் பரிதியப்பர் கோயில்) is a Tamil temple located at Parithiappar Koil, Keezhvengainaadu in Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Shiva, as the moolavar presiding deity, in his manifestation as Parithiappar.

topPlaces.name: Alivoikkal
topPlaces.description: Azhiyavaikkal is a village in the Orathanadu taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Someswarar Temple, Pazhayarai?
faq.a: The best time to visit Someswarar Temple, Pazhayarai is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Someswarar Temple, Pazhayarai?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (59 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (62 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Someswarar Temple, Pazhayarai?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Someswarar Temple, Pazhayarai at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Someswarar Temple, Pazhayarai?
faq.a: Stays in Someswarar Temple, Pazhayarai start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Someswarar Temple, Pazhayarai?
faq.a: The top attractions are Orathanadu Taluk, Thennamanadu, Ayangudi, Thanjavur, Tirumangalakottai East, Orathanad.
